text:
Created attachment 168428
I'm an idiot.  This one works.

The good news is I figured out what was wrong with the previous patches. The bad news is that it is exceptionally embarrassing.  ~/Downloads exists on my workstation and laptop, did the port work on the workstation but uploaded the patch from my laptop. And I didn't update the file on my laptop. 

Sorry.
